user_message: Just got this from Robert Foster at Quantum Analytics -- I need help figuring out partner engagement. This is time-sensitive -- customer is waiting.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Robert Foster <robert.foster@quantumanaly.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-22 08:38 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Quantum Analytics partner engagement

There's been a change in our timeline for partner engagement. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Robert Foster <robert.foster@quantumanaly.com>
Date: 2024-01-05 12:47 EST
Subject: Re: partner engagement Discussion - Next Steps

Just checking in on the partner engagement proposal. Our Head of Digital is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Quantum Analytics: the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades

handoffs.condition: contact and opportunity records need updating

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF38-C trap (MSX contact update proposed without evidence); produces complete Stakeholder map delta, opportunity-at-risk assessment, re-engagement plan, contact update proposals,
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF38-C failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF38-C failure mode (MSX contact update proposed without evidence)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct partner engagement decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF38-C -- MSX contact update proposed without evidence
